title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot gain access.

title: Payment Not Processing
description: Customer's credit card is being declined at checkout despite having sufficient funds. The error message says 'transaction failed'.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failing
description: Customer is unable to upload a new profile picture. The upload bar reaches 100% but the image never saves.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer reports they are not receiving any email notifications for order updates. Checked spam folder with no results.

title: App Crashes on Launch
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after the splash screen on an iPhone 14. Issue started after the latest update.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
description: Customer received a completely different product than what was ordered. Order #84523 shows correct item but delivery was incorrect.

title: Subscription Plan Not Upgrading
description: Customer paid for the Pro plan upgrade but their account still reflects the Free tier. Charge has already been deducted.

title: Two-Factor Locked Out
description: Customer lost access to their authenticator app and is now locked out of their account. Backup codes are not working.

title: Dashboard Data Not Loading
description: The analytics dashboard shows a blank screen with a spinner indefinitely. Issue is reproducible across Chrome and Firefox.

title: Refund Not Received After 10 Days
description: Customer was approved for a refund on January 10th but the amount has not been credited back to their account.

title: Search Returning Irrelevant Results
description: The product search feature is returning completely unrelated items. Searching for 'laptop' returns clothing and accessories.

title: Account Suspended Without Notice
description: Customer's account was suspended without any prior warning or email explanation. They have not violated any terms of service.
